spec_trace.roadmap_pointer: Handshake_Master_Spec_v02.144.md 7.6.3 (Phase 1) -> [ADD v02.144] Second-pass feature-family coverage / coverage sweep

draft_scope.intent:
- What: Backfill Thinking Pipeline as an explicit runtime handoff system across Docs, Canvas, Workflows, and synthesis surfaces.
- Why: Thinking Pipeline is one of the clearest force multipliers in Handshake, but it remains too metaphorical for deterministic future model/tool use.
draft_scope.scope_sketch:
- IN_SCOPE:
  - Runtime handoff mapping between Docs, Canvas, Workflows, and synthesis outputs.
  - Operator/runtime visibility for handoff steps.
- OUT_OF_SCOPE:
  - Full workflow authoring implementation.
  - Complex automation beyond the handoff contract.
draft_scope.acceptance_criteria:
- Thinking Pipeline has explicit runtime and operator-visibility coverage.
- Appendix mapping makes future model/tool reasoning about handoffs deterministic.
draft_scope.risks_unknowns: - Risk: Thinking Pipeline stays inspirational prose and cannot be used deterministically by later models/tools.

assumptions_to_attack: A stub is planning metadata, not execution authority.
Stub Markdown may contain stale draft scope until activated through a signed packet.
Apps must not treat stub contracts as runnable work packets.
minimum_controls: Require official packet contract before Coder or Validator launch.
Fail drift checks when stub Markdown changes without contract regeneration.
